title: Establishment of ferries in parish of Orleans
doc_html:
§992.  Establishment of ferries in parish of Orleans

The governing body of the city of New Orleans may establish and regulate ferries across the Mississippi River, in the parish of Orleans.
doc_text:
§992.  Establishment of ferries in parish of Orleans
The governing body of the city of New Orleans may establish and regulate ferries across the Mississippi River, in the parish of Orleans.
